title: Deadly Hantavirus scare on Atlantic Cruise Ship leaves 3 dead, British passenger critical
summary_full: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard the luxury expedition ship MV Hondius has resulted in three deaths and several serious illnesses, prompting an international health response. The virus, typically spread by rodents, has raised concerns due to its rapid escalation and potential for severe respiratory complications. Authorities are working to contain the crisis and evacuate affected passengers.
